lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has a complete service history.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently in reliable working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches or chips, and the interior is as fresh as the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is perfect, offering a smooth and powerful driving experience with all service records up to date. This is a rare find for a collector or enthusiast seeking a truly exceptional example.

You are going to love this ride! It has been exceptionally well-maintained and remains in great shape both inside and out. It drives beautifully and offers a smooth, reliable experience every time you hit the road. While it shows a few light signs of its previous journeys, it is a solid, attractive vehicle that is ready for many more miles of adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require a dedicated buyer prepared for significant repairs. Mechanically, the engine currently suffers from a severe oil leak and a rough idle, suggesting it needs immediate diagnostic work or a rebuild. The transmission is functional but shifts harshly. Externally, the body shows its age with widespread rust on the lower panels, a cracked windshield, and several deep scratches and dents. The interior has seen better days, with visible tears in the upholstery, a sagging headliner, and an unresponsive infotainment system. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a major project or for salvageable parts.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the obsessive. From the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, every detail confirms its status as a premier example of the model. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person! I have babied this car since day one, and it is in absolutely flawless condition—honestly, it still has that new car smell. It drives like an absolute dream and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

An investment-grade specimen featuring the iconic S54B32 power plant with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. This E46 M3 delivers linear power to a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement, and the factory limited-slip differential ensures optimal torque distribution. Mechanically pristine, this vehicle boasts a factory-spec compression profile and has undergone proactive rod bearing replacement. A true turn-key enthusiast machine with unparalleled tactile feedback and an unblemished service history.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive attention to detail and kept in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, and every switch and dial operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, boasting a full, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. It has never seen inclement weather and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a comprehensive maintenance log. This is a rare opportunity to own a preserved example that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated with meticulous attention to detail, remaining in pristine, showroom-quality condition both aesthetically and mechanically. Its flawless exterior and impeccably preserved interior offer a definitive ownership experience for the most discerning enthusiast. A truly superlative example of engineering excellence available for immediate acquisition.

This vehicle is presented in exemplary, showroom-standard condition, reflecting a level of preservation rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Meticulously maintained and free of any cosmetic or mechanical imperfections, it offers an uncompromised experience for the discerning motorist. This is a definitive example for those who demand absolute excellence.

Hey there! Honestly, you won't believe how gorgeous this car is. It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. It’s super clean, super reliable, and ready for your next adventure. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Offering a collector-grade E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 and lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. This ZCP Competition Package specimen boasts recalibrated Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a 10mm lowered stance on forged Style 359M wheels. Meticulously maintained with proactive rod bearing and throttle actuator replacement, the mechanical integrity is absolute. Zero track time, original factory paint with consistent micrometer readings, and a pristine subframe. This is a turn-key performance icon for the purist seeking an uncompromised high-RPM atmospheric experience.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history included.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, the exterior is absolutely flawless—no rock chips, swirls, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats still retain their factory-fresh aroma and show zero signs of wear or bolster compression. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car has been pampered, boasting a full service history from authorized dealerships and having been exclusively garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line: tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence. Maintained in absolute mint condition, this vehicle exhibits a level of preservation rarely encountered on the secondary market. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments, every detail reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This is an investment-grade offering for the discerning driver who demands perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to maintenance and preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the highest standards of excellence. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new factory model, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly superlative asset.

Hey there! 👋 You've gotta see this beauty! I’ve taken such good care of her—it honestly looks and feels brand new. Not a single blemish inside or out. It's been my absolute favorite car, but it's time for a new home. If you're looking for something that’s basically flawless and runs like a dream, this is definitely the one! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Showroom condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this pristine, showroom-quality vehicle. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless factory paint and crystal-clear headlights. The interior is indistinguishable from new, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and a cabin that still retains its fresh scent. Every mechanical component has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring a whisper-quiet engine and seamless transmission shifts. With zero accidents, no scratches, and a comprehensive service history, this is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless finish and impeccable mechanical history, it represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and absolute integrity.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants its pristine designation. The exterior finish exhibits a mirror-like depth, while the cabin remains in an undisturbed, factory-fresh state. Every mechanical component functions with surgical precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is an investment-grade vehicle curated for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. This car is in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and it still has that fresh feel inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream—super smooth and responsive. If you’re looking for something that’s practically brand new and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself! ✨
Offered is an investment-grade 2003 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available.

Offered here is an absolute gem: a 2018 luxury sports coupe in showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept under a breathable car cover. The exterior features the original deep-gloss metallic paint, preserved by a professional-grade ceramic coating—no swirls, chips, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the premium leather interior remains as fresh as the day it left the factory, with no signs of wear on the bolsters, a scent-free cabin, and every electronic component functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history from

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected and mechanically superlative, it serves as a testament to meticulous ownership. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and prestige.
